description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs only on tags, defines the stages test, build, publish, and postupload, and uses python:3.10 as the default Docker image. In the test stage add a test job that executes echo "Testing", apt-get update, apt-get install -y gfortran, pip3 install setuptools, pip3 install ., rm -rf smuthi, pip3 install nose2, and nose2 -v. In the build stage add a dist job using the quay.io/pypa/manylinux2014_x86_64 image, runs chmod +x CI/build-wheel-manylinux.sh and CI/build-wheel-manylinux.sh, and publishes the resulting dist/ directory as an artifact that expires after one week. In the publish stage add a pypi job that installs twine with pip, echoes "Upload to PyPi", and uploads the wheels using twine upload --skip-existing dist/*, while providing a PYPI_ID_TOKEN id token for authentication. In the postupload stage add three wheel‑test jobs: whl_test_centos8 using inveniosoftware/centos8-python:3.8, whl_test_python38 using python:3.8, and whl_test_ubuntu_focal2004LTS using ubuntu:focal; each runs pip3 install smuthi, pip3 install nose2, rm -rf smuthi, and nose2 -v, with the Ubuntu job also installing python3‑pip via apt.
